goon: noun. A thug; a usually muscular henchman with little intelligence.
got: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Gothic.
gout: noun. An extremely painful inflammation of joints, especially of the big toe, caused by a metabolic defect resulting in the accumulation of
gun: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Mbya Guarani.
gut: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Maléku Jaíka.
ingot: noun. A solid block of more or less pure metal, often but not necessarily bricklike in shape and trapezoidal in cross-section, the result
into: preposition. To or towards the inside of.
ion: noun. An atom or group of atoms bearing an electrical charge, such as the sodium and chlorine atoms in a salt solution.
nit: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Southeastern Kolami.
nog: symbol. ISO 639-2 & ISO 639-3 language code for Nogai.
not: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Nomatsiguenga.
nut: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Nùng.
